channel.title: Course Notes on Analyst
channel.description: Recent content in Course Notes on Analyst

item.title: Slacking Insider Threats by Magnet Forensics
item.description: These are my course notes from Slacking on insider threat by Magnet Forensics. Thank you, guys, for sharing!

item.title: File System Forensics
item.description: My notes of several forensics books. Including but not limited to “File System Forensic Analysis”.

item.title: Hands-on Experience
item.description: All the challenges I’ve completed and solved 🛠️ - in process, ✔️ - done. Forensics Autopsy 8-Hour Course + DFIR challenge ✔️ Practical Malware Analysis ​l​a​b​s​ ✔️ CrackMe (1 and 2 for interview) ✔️ MacOS problem 2 from here ✔️ Pentest Skillset labs ✔️ BeeWAPP ✔️ InsecureBankv2 ✔️ General Viginear Cipher (Coursera) ✔️

item.title: Hands-on Experience
item.description: *All the courses I’ve completed 👀 - in process, ✔️ - done, watched and now being digested into articles on the website - 🍔 *

item.title: Library
item.description: All the books and articles that I’ve read and found interesting. 📖 reading now, ✔️ - read.

item.title: Memory Forensics
item.description: This is my course notes from SDF series, Memory Forensics, Part 1. Intro Installed volatile on mac:

item.title: Dfir Intro
item.description: This is my lecture notes of DFIR intro course. As I learn more that was provided in the course, I’ll add a reference and data.
Tools WinPrefetchView To view pretech files (decompressed as well) in GUI. Fred - Forensic Registry Editor To view exported hives.
